title: Get a spare SIM and add it to all 9 school WhatsApp groups
description: Buy a cheap second SIM to use as the dedicated CoachConnect number. Add it to all 9 NIETE school groups so automated messages can be sent safely without risking the personal number.

title: Try Make.com automation with Google Sheet
description: Set up a Make.com scenario that reads from a Google Sheet and sends a WhatsApp message to one school group. This proves the no-code automation works before building the full app.
